docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NGO, HUNG IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ARNULFO, BARAJAS PLAINTIFF FAILED TO YIELD THE RIGHT OF WAY TO THE DEFENDANT AS SHOWN BY THE EVIDENCE.
